bracu_official.title: BRAC University and Sporsho Braille Foundation visit Baptist Mission Integrated School
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University partnered with the Sporsho Braille Foundation to conduct a visit to the Baptist Mission Integrated School, fostering community engagement and support.

bracu_official.title: Argentine ambassador joins BRAC University students to watch his home team’s World Cup quarter-final match
bracu_official.summary: The Argentine ambassador visited BRAC University to join students in watching his home country's World Cup quarter-final match, creating a unique international experience.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University Response Team leads blood donation and Thalassemia awareness campaign
bracu_official.summary: The BRAC University Response Team organized and led a successful blood donation and Thalassemia awareness campaign, contributing to public health efforts.

bracu_official.title: Public Reporting on Contract Signing – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD2
bracu_official.summary: This announcement pertains to the public reporting requirements for the contract signing of project B-113, specifically referencing ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD2.

bracu_official.title: Public Reporting on Contract Signing – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD1
bracu_official.summary: This announcement details the public reporting for the contract signing of project B-113, referencing ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD1.

bracu_official.title: UG "Wishlist" Event Schedule, Fall 2026
bracu_official.summary: The event schedule for the Undergraduate (UG) 'Wishlist' for the Fall 2026 semester has been released. Students can now view upcoming dates.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: A notice of award has been issued for project B-113, specifically related to the ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2 initiative.

bracu_official.title: Final Examinations
bracu_official.summary: A notice regarding the upcoming final examinations scheduled for December 10th has been posted.

bracu_official.title: Final Examinations
bracu_official.summary: This is a notice concerning the final examinations scheduled to take place on September 12th.

bracu_official.title: Eid-e-Miladun Nabi* - University closed
bracu_official.summary: The university will observe a closure on August 26th in recognition of Eid-e-Miladun Nabi.

bracu_official.title: July Mass Uprising Day
bracu_official.summary: This announcement marks the observance of July Mass Uprising Day on August 5th.
